purpose: Machine-readable prompt ladder for Urban Analytics implementation. The ledger is the execution source of truth; this manifest defines the ordered prompt catalog.

requiredPreflight: Read the token-minimized context documents first.
Search canonical documents only for the active prompt id, heading, status row, or named section.
Inspect every file named by the prompt.
Verify prior prompt status from the ledger.
Check repository status if version control metadata is available.
Update the ledger before final response.
requiredValidation: Run lint if available and relevant.
Run targeted tests if the prompt changed logic.
Record exact validation results in the ledger.
amnesiaGuardrails: Do not rely on chat memory.
Do not assume prior prompt completion.
Do not change Synapse IDE or Map Explorer internals unless the active prompt explicitly requires a contract adapter.
Do not silently mutate evidence artifacts, analysis outputs, user files, report content, dashboard bindings, or education state.
